results.result_notes: Source prints only surnames or shorthand names for this team
Source wraps team name onto a continuation line

event_name: Bog Slog 2002 - St. Edward State Park
event_notes: Weather dreary and damp; Course 4 re-created the long course from the 1980 Bog Slog for the club's 25th anniversary (designed by Dave Enger).
event_comments:
Weather: Dreary and damp but not actually raining, at least most of the time.
*To celebrate the 25th anniversary of COC, course 4 was a re-creation of the long course from the 1980 Bog Slog, designed by Dave Enger.
*Pie winners
